subcodes.first_line: Though thy book hath not been brought before Us, yet We are indeed aware of all that hath been inscribed therein, for verily thy Lord is all-knowing of all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ما حضر بین یدینا کتابک ولکن عندنا علم ما سطر فیه و ان ربک بکل شیء علیم و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @angels, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
